_comment: sovereign-os M060 D-CLI mirror chain dashboard. Visualizes the selfdef-side cli-mirror doctor textfile series shipped via the selfdef-cli-mirror-doctor.timer systemd unit (60s cadence) into node_exporter's textfile_collector. Pairs with the 3 alert rules (M060CliMirrorChainDegraded/Broken/ObserverSilent) in config/prometheus/alerts/m060-chain-health.rules.yml and the runbook sections in docs/operator/m060-deployment-guide.md. Operator imports into Grafana via Settings → JSON Model. Project boundary R10212: pure observability — no mutation surface.

panels.title: worst severity (0=ok 1=warn 2=fail)
panels.description: Single rollup: the worst severity across all 4 cli-mirror chain checks (schema-version / resident-store / systemd-unit / published-mirror). Drives the M060CliMirrorChain{Degraded,Broken} alerts.

panels.title: doctor observer age (s)
panels.description: Seconds since the selfdef-cli-mirror-doctor.timer last fired. Red >5min (the timer is wedged — M060CliMirrorObserverSilent alert).

panels.title: checks failing (severity ≥1)
panels.description: How many of the 4 chain checks are in WARN or FAIL right now. 0 = chain green.

panels.title: hosts reporting
panels.description: Distinct hosts exposing selfdef_cli_mirror_doctor_* via node_exporter. Sudden drops mean the doctor timer stopped or node_exporter stopped scraping textfiles on those hosts.

panels.title: per-check severity over time
panels.description: One series per check (schema-version, resident-store, systemd-unit, published-mirror). 0 = pass, 1 = warn, 2 = fail. Lets operators see when a degradation started + which link broke.

panels.title: worst-severity rollup over time
panels.description: Single rollup line tracking the worst case across all checks. The M060CliMirrorChainDegraded alert fires when this == 1 for 5m; M060CliMirrorChainBroken fires when this == 2 for 2m.

panels.title: current check state (with fix line)
panels.description: Live triage table. The detail + fix labels carry the same operator-actionable text the standalone selfdefctl cli-mirror doctor verb prints. Hover-render the fix column to get the exact remediation command.

panels.title: doctor observer age (s) over time
panels.description: Wall-clock seconds since the doctor timer last fired. Steady saw-tooth ramping 0 -> 60 -> 0 indicates a healthy 60s timer. A flat-line ramp without resets means the timer is wedged.

panels.title: chain-wide alert firing (M060Chain* via m060-health-api)
panels.description: Companion view of the existing chain-wide alerts (offline/degraded/stale/unreachable) so operators see both signals in one place. Per-result rate on the m060-health-api request counter.

title: sovereign-os — M060 D-CLI mirror chain
